name: gemini-obsidian
description: Obsidian Vault integration with local RAG capabilities for Codex and Gemini CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Search, read, and maintain an Obsidian vault from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds Obsidian vault tools, local RAG retrieval, and note-management skills to Codex while remaining compatible with the Gemini CLI extension manifest.
defaultPrompt: Search my Obsidian vault for notes about {{topic}}.
Index my vault and tell me if anything failed.
Open today's daily note and summarize the action items.
